headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Mohawk Industries, Lowers Price Target to $105
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Sam Reid   maintains Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $125 to $105.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Mohawk Industries, Lowers Price Target to $96
summary: Barclays  analyst Matthew Bouley   maintains Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $121 to $96.
